# md-share

> Self-hostable markdown rendering and sharing service. Upload markdown via HTTP,
> get back a link that renders it as a clean web page — for chat/messenger
> workflows where raw .md files don't render.

## Docs

- [API reference](docs/API.md): endpoints, auth modes, request/response schemas, error codes, retention, what renders
- [Agent skill](skills/md-share/SKILL.md): installable instructions teaching an AI agent to publish markdown through md-share
- [README](README.md): overview, configuration, deployment

## Optional

- [Confluence macro plugin](https://github.com/junsik/md-share-confluence): renders md-share links (and .md attachments) on Confluence Server pages
